title: Lock the product workspace contract against the real app
summary: Bring the PRD, summary, harness mode, and source-of-truth docs in line with the actual product surface that already exists in code.
acceptance: The docs describe the real upload, OCR, image, audio, video, mission, and library flow.
The active harness mode matches the UI-polish stage of the product.
The task graph no longer points at bootstrap-template work.
notes: Completed after the first failed Ralph bootstrap exposed stale planning state.
